product_highlights: EcoPep for Hair — natural oat-derived peptide for scalp revitalisation and hair strengthening
Oat-derived beta-glucans for scalp soothing and moisturisation
ColourSave — oat active for colour protection and vibrancy
Sustainable, upcycled oat processing with zero-waste manufacturing
notes: Oat Cosmetics is a UK-based specialist in oat-derived cosmetic ingredients, offering a unique range of natural actives for hair and scalp care applications. Their EcoPep for Hair is a natural peptide fraction derived from oat that supports scalp vitality and hair fibre strengthening, providing a plant-based alternative to synthetic peptide actives. Oat Cosmetics operates a zero-waste, upcycled manufacturing process, making them a leading choice for brands committed to both performance and sustainability.
